title: arenaria megalantha var. ensifolia
intro: Arenaria megalantha var. ensifolia, also known as the Glacier Candytuft, is a flowering plant species within the carnation family. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. The herbal preparations of Glacier Candytuft typically involve infusions, teas, or decoctions made from its leaves and flowers, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
